evidence_summary: Establish the physical scale of the forest chasm to create tension, then pivot to a display of character competence through the cowardly lion's leap-and-ferry sequence.
The group encounters a wide, deep chasm. The Cowardly Lion overcomes his fear to leap across the gap, acting as a ferry by carrying each companion on his back one by one.
Group stands at the precipice of a wide, deep forest ditch looking across in anxiety.
The entire group is reunited on the far side of the chasm.
The cowardly_lion leaps across the gap and carries each companion back and forth one by one.
